case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 72 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.298/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 31.01.2024. Thereafter the matter is fixed in Court today after lapse of one year. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel reflects that they are not interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
